## Title: Fix integer overflow in TLV length calculation

### Summary
Fix integer overflow vulnerability in the TLV (Type-Length-Value) packing functions used throughout the nFAPI interface. The `pack_tlv()` and `pack_nr_tlv()` functions calculate length by subtracting pointers (`(*ppWritePackedMsg) - pStartOfValue`) and directly assign the result to a `uint16_t` field. When the packed data exceeds 65,535 bytes, this causes silent integer truncation, producing incorrect length headers that can l
